headline: DICK'S Sporting's Q1 Comps Rise 6%: Can Market Share Gains Continue?
summary: DKS kicks off FY26 with 6% comps, driven by higher ticket and traffic, as new customers and digital bets fuel talk of ongoing market-share gains.
